title: Ishaq's despatch of the remaining recalcitrants to the Caliph at Tarsus
description: Ishaq's despatch of the remaining recalcitrants to the Caliph at Tarsus. Recorded under the year 218 AH (833–834 CE) in al-Tabari's History, volume 32.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 32
